note: Official product page for Arch Re's treaty and facultative reinsurance offerings, underwriting approach, alternative capital context, and financial-strength positioning.

note: Market-data reference for intraday market cap, trailing PE ratio, trailing net income, ROE, shares outstanding, and valuation cross-checking.

title: Etherisc | Make Insurance Fair and Accessible
note: Project homepage describing Etherisc as a decentralized insurance protocol for building and distributing parametric insurance products.

note: Technical documentation for Etherisc's Generic Insurance Framework, decentralized insurance products, smart contracts, risk pools, and oracle-mediated workflows.

note: Public repositories supporting the openness assessment for Etherisc's decentralized insurance infrastructure.

title: Open Source Insurance Software: Insurance Policy Management
note: Open-source insurance policy-management platform positioned as customizable infrastructure for brokers, MGAs, agencies, and insurance operators.

title: openkoda/openkoda
note: Public source repository for Openkoda, including MIT licensing, application templates, and insurance application references.

title: Oasis Loss Modelling Framework
note: Open-source catastrophe modelling platform and open framework relevant to transparent insurance and reinsurance risk modelling.

title: Open Data Transformation Framework
